packageRules.description: Bump @types/node major manually to match the Node.js version in devEngines.runtime, which Renovate cannot update yet (renovatebot/renovate#38067)
First-party packages; skip the release-age waiting period and update immediately
Pin to 2.1.15; 2.1.16 and later break functional pseudo-classes with & (cristianbote/goober#605)
